max_positions_per_tier.note: Concentration limit — prevents overexposure to correlated assets within same tier

tier_1.label: Blue Chips (BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, AVAX, DOT, LINK, POL)
tier_1.note: Guidelines for Sonnet — highest conviction, most patient

tier_2.label: Established (ATOM, NEAR, OP, ARB, SUI, AAVE, UNI, etc.)
tier_2.note: Guidelines for Sonnet — standard risk management

kelly.note: Half-Kelly position sizing. Requires min_trades completed trades. Disabled until sufficient data.

tier_3.label: UNUSED — no T3 symbols active
tier_3.note: All active symbols are T1 or T2. Meme coins and speculative tokens excluded.

dca.note: DISABLED — 0% DCA win rate (0/2). Re-enable when base win rate exceeds re_enable_win_rate.

thresholds.note: These are ALERTS to Haiku, not trading triggers. The AI decides what matters. OBV thresholds: recent 10-period SMA vs prior 10-period SMA ratio.

confidence_thresholds.note: Safety net — Sonnet can still make intelligent decisions below these, but actions are downgraded

escalation.note: min_confidence lowered 0.65→0.55 to break stagnation. volume_threshold_ceiling lowered 5.0→3.0 to allow T2 signals through. stagnation override triggers after 1 session with 0 trades.

circuit_breaker.note: Safety net — pauses trading after 4 consecutive losses OR total drawdown exceeds max_drawdown_percent

sms.note: SMS via Twilio for critical trade alerts only

exit_scanner.note: Lowered urgency_threshold from 40 to 30 to cut losers faster. Critical bypasses cooldown.

BEAR.note: Bear market: allow oversold bounces, reduce sizing 40%, lower confidence threshold from 0.72 to 0.65

CAUTIOUS.note: Cautious: allow oversold bounces, reduce sizing 20%, slightly lower confidence threshold

changelog.note: Tracks rule changes to prevent add/remove oscillation. Rules added+deactivated 3+ times in 14 days are blocked. Opus sees last 30 days of changes.

learning.note: min_new_trades_for_update set to 0 to allow learning to update rules even with no new trades — prevents stale REJECT rules from locking the system.

fees.note: Per-side fee rate. Binance.US: 0.1% (0.001). Coinbase: 0.6% taker (0.006). Coinbase adapter uses its own fee_rate for paper trades.

short_selling.note: SHORT disabled by default. Paper-only — Binance.US spot does not support short selling.

exchange.note: Multi-exchange routing active. Symbols routed per DB 'exchange' column. binance_us (30 symbols) + coinbase (53 symbols).

coinbase.note: Uses COINBASE_API_KEY + EC private key (JWT/ES256 auth). Full trading support.

kraken.note: Uses KRAKEN_API_KEY and KRAKEN_SECRET_KEY from .env. Not yet implemented.

emergency_stop_loss.note: Hard stop-loss bypass — no AI approval needed. Independent 30s price monitoring loop.

predictive.note: Predictive positions are ADDITIONAL to reactive max (7+3=10). BTC-led candidates ranked by profit_score across all tiers.
